titleEn: Argentina reports HPAI outbreak in Buenos Aires
titleZh: 阿根廷布宜诺斯艾利斯省暴发高致病性禽流感，英国暂停部分禽肉进口
summaryZh: 阿根廷布宜诺斯艾利斯省一家重型种禽养殖场暴发高致病性禽流感（HPAI）H5亚型疫情，导致3万只家禽易感，694例感染并死亡。英国因缺乏区域化协议，暂停从阿根廷进口2月23日后生产的新鲜禽肉及部分未达到热处理要求的禽肉产品，但鸡蛋及蛋制品不受影响。该事件对禽业贸易和生物安全防控具有警示意义，但与智慧畜牧技术关联度较低。
featuredReason: 该新闻虽非直接涉及智慧畜牧技术，但禽流感疫情对全球禽业贸易和生物安全策略有重要影响，智慧畜牧从业者可从中关注疫病监测与防控的行业动态。
contentFull: Health & disease Diseases Avian influenza Argentina reports HPAI outbreak in Buenos Aires UK suspends some poultry imports following confirmation 27 February 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media Europe South America Argentina reported an outbreak of high pathogenicity avian influenza in poultry in Buenos Aires province, according to the World Organisation for Animal Health (WOAH).The immediate notification, published Feb. 23 through WOAH’s World Animal Health Information System (WAHIS), The virus was detected on a heavy breeding poultry farm in the province of Buenos Aires, where increased mortality and clinical signs consistent with HPAI were observed. Laboratory testing confirmed high pathogenicity avian influenza subtype H5. The outbreak is ongoing.According to the report, 30,000 domestic birds were susceptible. A total of 694 cases and 694 deaths were recorded.In response, the UK Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs said that in the absence of a regionalisation agreement, the whole territory of Argentina is no longer considered free from HPAI. The UK Office for SPS Trade Assurance amended its third country listings on Feb. 25, 2026 to suspend imports of fresh poultry meat from Argentina produced on or after Feb. 23, 2026, as well as certain poultry meat products not subject to specified heat treatment requirements, while imports of eggs and egg products remain unaffected. Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International Global Ag Media More from this author More News View all WOAH reports 2.16 million birds lost to HPAI in May Health & disease Diseases Avian influenza 1 July 2026 1 minute read Canadian firms launch world's earliest in-ovo egg sexing system In-ovo sexing 1 July 2026 1 minute read Hyperspectral technology determines sex from day four of incubation Nepal culls birds as H5N1 outbreak spreads to 11 districts Health & disease Diseases Avian influenza 1 July 2026 1 minute read Kathmandu Valley worst affected as zoo closes to public Our Partners World Poultry Science Association Congress Poultry Science Association Targan dsm-firmenich Lallemand Lanxess BioZyme Hy-Line International
translationZh:
据世界动物卫生组织（WOAH）报告，阿根廷在布宜诺斯艾利斯省报告了一起家禽高致病性禽流感疫情。

该紧急通报于2月23日通过WOAH的世界动物卫生信息系统（WAHIS）发布。病毒在布宜诺斯艾利斯省一家重型种禽养殖场被检测到，该场观察到死亡率上升和符合HPAI的临床症状。实验室检测确认了高致病性禽流感H5亚型。疫情仍在持续。

根据报告，共有3万只家禽易感。记录到694例病例和694例死亡。

作为回应，英国环境、食品和农村事务部表示，由于缺乏区域化协议，阿根廷全境不再被视为无HPAI状态。英国SPS贸易保障办公室于2026年2月25日修订了其第三国名单，暂停从阿根廷进口2026年2月23日及之后生产的新鲜禽肉，以及某些未达到特定热处理要求的禽肉产品，而鸡蛋和蛋制品的进口不受影响。
contentHtml:
Argentina reports HPAI outbreak in Buenos Aires 
UK suspends some poultry imports following confirmation
